title: selliguea werneri
intro: Selliguea werneri, also known as the Philippine fern, is a type of medicinal plant that belongs to the family Polypodiaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Selliguea werneri include the treatment of various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and wounds, as well as the potential to lower cholesterol levels and improve blood circulation. Selliguea werneri can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often used in traditional medicine in Southeast Asia, particularly in the Philippines.
